title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Agility India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Agility India
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
